summary: Crypto markets show mixed sentiment with Bitcoin continuing its strong uptrend toward $82,100-$84,000 resistance levels, while most altcoins remain range-bound with minimal volatility; commodities (gold, silver, oil) similarly lack directional conviction despite gold's longer-term bullish outlook toward $5,000/oz by Q4 2026.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Multiple videos highlight Bitcoin rallying, going higher, squeezing, and targeting $85K after traps, indicating bullish continuation.

signals.name: Altcoins
signals.reason: Titles indicate altcoins poised to pop, next after Bitcoin rally, altseason starting, and moving independent of BTC.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Ethereum down 1% trading around $2,300 with no significant directional momentum in the last 7 days.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: Solana down 3% over the last 7 days, trading around $84 with weakness relative to broader market.

signals.name: Ripple
signals.reason: Ripple down 2.8% trading at $138 with continued downward pressure in the last 7 days.

signals.name: Binance Coin
signals.reason: BNB down 2% trading around $610-$620 with weakness alongside other major altcoins.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold trading at $4,715.85/oz with bullish long-term outlook; J.P. Morgan expects prices to push toward $5,000/oz by Q4 2026 driven by central bank demand and ETF inflows.
signals.source: J.P. Morgan Global Research & Trading Economics

signals.name: Silver
signals.reason: Silver trading at $80.32/oz with minimal movement; no significant directional momentum despite gold strength.

signals.name: Crude Oil (WTI)
signals.reason: Crude oil at $95.42/bbl with modest 0.64% gain but lacking conviction; volatility present but no clear directional bias.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Brent crude at $101.29/bbl with modest upside but no strong directional conviction in current market.

signals.name: S&P 500
signals.reason: S&P 500 bulls targeting 7,450 as mega-cap tech continues to fuel May initial rally with strong momentum.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: Apple part of mega-cap tech fueling S&P 500 rally in May with strong institutional demand.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: Nvidia part of mega-cap tech leadership driving market strength in May 2026.

signals.name: Alphabet/Google
signals.reason: Alphabet contributing to mega-cap tech momentum fueling broader market rally in May.

signals.name: CoinMarketCap 20 Index
signals.reason: CMC 20 index up only 0.20% in last 7 days at $157, indicating stagnation across top 20 cryptocurrencies.

signals.name: Nifty 50 (Indian Index)
signals.reason: Indian market showing mixed signals with support zones at 9,500 and potential pullback to 7,600; no clear directional bias.
